audit_log.check: Autonomy: PASS (diagnostic frameworks guide troubleshooting, not prescriptive fixes)
Consciousness: PASS (RIGHT-SMART analytical diagnosis + BOTTOM-SAFE circuit breakers)

component.activation_strategy: RIGHT systematic diagnosis (identify root cause not symptoms) + BOTTOM protective circuit breakers (kill losers fast)

failure_mode.name: Creative Fatigue
failure_mode.symptoms: Hook Rate drops >30% from baseline; Frequency >3.0 (Prospecting); CPA rises while CTR drops
failure_mode.root_cause: Audience saturation of specific visual/hook; novelty worn off
failure_mode.diagnosis: Compare current Hook Rate (last 3 days) vs Launch Week Hook Rate
failure_mode.recovery: Launch new Concept (not variation) in fresh pack immediately
failure_mode.prevention: Follow Rule of 1:10k (1 new ad/week per $10k spend)

failure_mode.name: Attribution Hallucination
failure_mode.symptoms: Ads Manager shows 4.0+ ROAS but bank account empty / MER flat
failure_mode.root_cause: Platform over-crediting View-Through conversions (Retargeting disguised as Prospecting)
failure_mode.diagnosis: Compare "1-day View" vs "7-day Click" breakdown; Calculate ncROAS
failure_mode.recovery: Switch to "Incremental" attribution or "7-day Click" only; tighten Exclusions
failure_mode.prevention: Use M3 Swim Lanes to strictly separate Prospecting from Retargeting

failure_mode.name: The Spend Hog
failure_mode.symptoms: One ad gets 90% of CBO budget; new test ads get zero spend
failure_mode.root_cause: Meta's predicted action rate favors known historical winner over unknown new test
failure_mode.diagnosis: Check spend distribution in CBO over last 3 days
failure_mode.recovery: Apply "Ad Set Spending Limit" (Min = 1x CPA) to starved ad sets for 3-7 days
failure_mode.prevention: Launch new creative packs in separate ad sets

failure_mode.name: Learning Limited Loop
failure_mode.symptoms: Ad sets stuck in "Learning," high CPA volatility day-to-day
failure_mode.root_cause: Budget too dispersed across too many ad sets; <50 conversions/week per set
failure_mode.diagnosis: Check conversion volume per ad set (<50 = starving)
failure_mode.recovery: Consolidate ad sets (merge audiences); move to Broad CBO
failure_mode.prevention: Use 3:2:2 Flexible Ads to consolidate creative data into fewer objects

failure_mode.name: Pixel Malnutrition
failure_mode.symptoms: Zero conversions in Ads Manager despite sales occurring; "Learning" never progresses
failure_mode.root_cause: Data signal loss (iOS14, AdBlockers) or CAPI disconnect
failure_mode.diagnosis: Check Events Manager "Event Match Quality" (<6.0 = critical failure)
failure_mode.recovery: Setup CAPI (Conversion API) or import "Offline Events" from CRM
failure_mode.prevention: Enable "Enhanced Matching" and CAPI during setup

failure_mode.name: Hook-Body Mismatch (Clickbait)
failure_mode.symptoms: High Hook Rate (>40%), High CTR, but Low Conversion Rate / Low Hold Rate
failure_mode.root_cause: Hook promises something body/offer doesn't deliver (Expectation misalignment)
failure_mode.diagnosis: Compare Hook Rate vs Hold Rate (15s). If gap massive, it's clickbait
failure_mode.recovery: Re-edit video body to match hook tone; ensure landing page headline matches ad hook

failure_mode.name: Lag Time Disconnect
failure_mode.symptoms: Ad account shows zero results; budget spends but algorithm can't optimize
failure_mode.diagnosis: Calculate time from Lead → Sale. If >7 days, Pixel is blind
failure_mode.recovery: Optimize for higher-funnel event (e.g., "Qualified Lead" or "Booked Call" instead of Purchase)

failure_mode.name: Audience Fragmentation
failure_mode.symptoms: High CPMs, overlapping audiences, competing against yourself
failure_mode.root_cause: Too many ad sets targeting similar people (e.g., "Lookalike 1%" vs "Lookalike 2%")
failure_mode.diagnosis: Use "Audience Overlap" tool; check for multiple ad sets targeting same geo/interest
failure_mode.recovery: Collapse all non-distinct audiences into one "Broad" or "Stack" ad set

failure_mode.name: The Junk Lead Spiral
failure_mode.symptoms: Low CPL (Cost Per Lead) but zero backend sales; sales team complaints
failure_mode.root_cause: Optimizing for volume (Lead) without quality signals; algorithm finding bots/low-intent users
failure_mode.recovery: Add friction (more form questions) or optimize for "Conversion Leads" (CRM integration)
failure_mode.prevention: Use "Offline Conversions" to train pixel on qualified leads only

failure_mode.name: Cost Cap Freeze
failure_mode.symptoms: Campaign stops spending completely; zero impressions
failure_mode.root_cause: Bid cap/Cost cap set lower than market auction price
failure_mode.diagnosis: Check "Delivery" status; if "Active" but no spend, bid too low
failure_mode.recovery: Raise bid by 10-20% daily until spend resumes, or switch to Lowest Cost
failure_mode.prevention: Set initial caps based on historical CPA + 20% buffer

failure_mode.name: Variable Testing Trap
failure_mode.symptoms: Testing many ads but performance stays flat; no "breakout" winners
failure_mode.root_cause: Testing minor variations (button color, font) instead of distinct concepts
failure_mode.diagnosis: Visual audit of active ads. Do they look 80% the same?
failure_mode.recovery: Adopt "Concept Over Variation" protocol; test entirely different angles

failure_mode.name: Retargeting Saturation
failure_mode.symptoms: Retargeting frequency >10; CPMs astronomical; ROAS declining
failure_mode.root_cause: Retargeting pool too small for budget allocated
failure_mode.diagnosis: Check Frequency on Retargeting Ad Set
failure_mode.recovery: Reduce retargeting budget or expand window (30 days → 180 days)
failure_mode.prevention: M3 Swim Lanes: Force budget to Prospecting to feed funnel

failure_mode.name: Native Format Misfit
failure_mode.symptoms: Low CTR, high CPM; ads look like "commercials"
failure_mode.diagnosis: "Native Audit" - does it look like friend's post or ad?
failure_mode.recovery: Remove logos, use system fonts, add "Ugly" filters or UGC style

failure_mode.name: Front-End Obsession
failure_mode.symptoms: High CTR, Low CPC, but low ROAS/High CPA
failure_mode.root_cause: Optimizing for clicks (traffic) rather than conversions; attracting window shoppers
failure_mode.diagnosis: Check objective (Traffic vs Sales) and optimization event
failure_mode.recovery: Switch objective to "Sales" (Conversions); accept higher CPC for better intent
failure_mode.prevention: Optimize for "Conversion Velocity" not cheap clicks

failure_mode.name: Algorithmic Whiplash
failure_mode.symptoms: Performance crashes after making manual edits
failure_mode.root_cause: Major changes (budget >20%, creative swaps) reset learning phase
failure_mode.recovery: Stop touching it. Let settle for 72 hours
failure_mode.prevention: Batch updates; use automated rules for scaling

anti_pattern.name: Variable Testing
anti_pattern.description: "Testing one hook, one thumbnail... that was the old way."
anti_pattern.instead: Test multiple unique creative formats simultaneously in one audience

anti_pattern.name: Frequent Pausing
anti_pattern.description: "Pausing or duplicating ads daily... forces Meta to restart learning phase."

anti_pattern.name: Front-End Obsession
anti_pattern.description: "Optimizing for front-end metrics like CTR... cheap clicks doesn't mean buying intent."

anti_pattern.name: Reactionary Pausing
anti_pattern.description: Turning off winning ad because of one bad day
anti_pattern.instead: Look at 7-day trends; spend is variable

anti_pattern.name: Micro-Segmentation
anti_pattern.description: Breaking audiences into tiny ad sets (Men 25-34)
anti_pattern.instead: Broad targeting allows Andromeda to find pocket

anti_pattern.name: The Perfect Ad
anti_pattern.instead: "Ugly" ads and "Lazy Statics" often outperform branded content

anti_pattern.name: The Retargeting Trap
anti_pattern.instead: Focus spend on New Customer Acquisition (ncROAS)

category.name: Diagnostic
category.heuristic: IF learning limited >7 days THEN consolidate ad sets or increase budget to hit 50 conversions/week [SRC: Ben Heath | 612]
IF one ad hogs >80% of CBO spend THEN launch separate "Testing Campaign" or use Ad Set Spending Limits [SRC: Ben Heath | 603]
IF Hook Rate <25% THEN audit first 3 seconds; visual interrupt weak [SRC: Fraser Cottrell | 888]
IF Hook Rate >40% but Hold Rate <10% THEN creative is clickbait; align body with hook [SRC: Jared Robinson | 483]
IF CPMs spike THEN check creative diversity; Andromeda penalizes repetitive formats [SRC: THE ECOM KING | 372]
IF Platform ROAS >3.0 but MER <2.0 THEN attribution hallucination; calculate ncROAS [SRC: Sam Piliero | 192]
IF frequency >3.0 in prospecting THEN creative fatigued; launch new concept [SRC: Tier 11 | 724]

category.name: Optimization
category.heuristic: IF ncROAS >1.5x THEN scale budget by 20% [SRC: Justin Lalonde | 7]
IF using Cost Caps and spend stops THEN raise bid by 10-20% [SRC: Sam Piliero | 521]
IF creative works THEN do not edit it; harvest Post ID to scaling campaign [SRC: Professor Charley T | 103]
IF under $1M revenue THEN focus on ONE avatar with multiple angles [SRC: Dr. Matt Shiver | 54]

category.name: Troubleshooting
category.heuristic: IF leads are low quality THEN add friction (questions) to form [SRC: Caden Thompson | 294]
IF static ads fail THEN try "Native" formats (Notes app, news headline) [SRC: Franky Shaw | 235]
IF production bottleneck THEN use "Nano Banana" (AI) to generate variations [SRC: Sam Piliero | 627]

workflow.name: My Ads Stopped Working (Fatigue vs Broken)
workflow.step: Check Date Range: Look at "Last 7 Days" vs "Previous Period"
Check Frequency: Is it >3.0? → Fatigue. Action: New Creative
Check CPM: Did it double? → Competition/Quality Drop. Action: Refresh Creative
Check CTR: Did it drop? → Ad Blindness. Action: New Hook
Check CVR: CTR stable but CVR dropped? → Landing Page/Offer issue. Action: Audit site speed/stock

workflow.name: I Can't Exit Learning Phase
workflow.step: Check Event Count: Are you getting 50 conversions/week?
IF NO: Is budget <$50/day? → Increase Budget
IF BUDGET OK: Splitting across 5 ad sets? → Consolidate to 1 Ad Set
IF CONSOLIDATED: Event too rare (e.g., Purchase)? → Move Up-Funnel (e.g., Add to Cart) temporarily

circuit_breaker.name: The Profit Floor
circuit_breaker.rule: IF ncROAS <1.0 for 7 days THEN STOP SCALING. Losing money on every new customer

circuit_breaker.name: The Spend Spiral
circuit_breaker.rule: IF CPA >3x Target for 48 hours with no conversions THEN KILL AD. Not going to "optimize" its way out

circuit_breaker.name: The Creative Dead End
circuit_breaker.rule: IF you launch 10 new concepts and 0 get spend THEN AUDIT OFFER. Problem likely product/offer, not ads

steps.step: Check Spend Amount (Did we hit budget?)
Check MER (Total Revenue / Total Spend). Is it healthy?
Check Top Ads. Any "Spend Hogs" with low ROAS?
Action: IF Spend Hog CPA >Target THEN apply "Ad Set Limit" or Pause
Launch in "Prospecting CBO" as new "Pack" (Ad Set)
Do NOT turn off old winner yet; let Andromeda shift spend naturally

compliance_guardrails.guardrail: IF ncROAS <1.0 for 7 days → STOP scaling (Circuit Breaker 1)
Never pause ads after 1-2 bad days; evaluate over 7-day windows minimum
Budget changes >20% reset learning phase; scale incrementally
